ast.name: VestingCliffClawback

functions.name: __covenant_policy_vest

exprs.span: { recipient: prev_states[0].recipient, grantor: prev_states[0].grantor, total: prev_states[0].total, cliff: prev_states[0].cliff, vested: 1, supply: prev_states[0].supply }

data.span: return({ recipient: prev_states[0].recipient, grantor: prev_states[0].grantor, total: prev_states[0].total, cliff: prev_states[0].cliff, vested: 1, supply: prev_states[0].supply });

__covenant_policy_withdraw

data.span: return({ recipient: prev_states[0].recipient, grantor: prev_states[0].grantor, total: prev_states[0].total, cliff: prev_states[0].cliff, vested: prev_states[0].vested, supply: prev_states[0].supply + amount });
